result:
All 30 tests pass. Here's a summary of what was added to `Main.scala`:

- **`status`** — prints staged filenames from the index (or `(none)`)
- **`diff <c1> <c2>`** — parses both commit file sections, reports Added/Removed/Modified per filename
- **`checkout <hash>`** — restores blobs to working directory, updates HEAD, clears index
- **`reset <hash>`** — updates HEAD and clears index without touching working directory files
- **`rm <file>`** — removes a filename entry from the index (exits 1 if not present)
- **`show <hash>`** — prints commit metadata + `Files:` section with 2-space indented entries sorted lexicographically
